definition: Placing two ideas side by side to highlight contrast.
example: The poem’s power comes from juxtaposition of silence and noise.

definition: Calculating amounts in chemical reactions from balanced equations.
example: Stoichiometry converts moles of reactants to grams of product.

definition: Designing tools and spaces to fit the human body safely.
example: Her ergonomic chair reduced neck strain.

definition: Eating extra starch before endurance events to store glycogen.
example: Runners often carbo-load days before a marathon.

definition: A central species whose removal sharply changes an ecosystem.
example: Sea otters are a keystone in kelp forests.
